form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months eased back early on 8th of 10 at this track Bm78 on April 1 over 1000m, slow going 3.5 len behind Fine Vintage carrying 54.5kg at $101. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Canterbury 5yo+ Bm72 on September 17 over 1250m, 4 len behind Our Queen with 59kg at $41. Looks to have a big job ahead again.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Last start 4th of 10 at this track Bm78 on April 1 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.4 len behind Fine Vintage with 53.5kg at $3.80. The start before that sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 7 at this track Bm72 on March 4 over 1000m, on a slow track; 1.75 len behind Wootton Lass with 59.5kg at $5. Finds a nice race this time and looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months got back early 4th in a small field at Randwick Kensington F&M Bm72 on March 25 over 1150m, slow going 6 len behind Horseshoe Hill carrying 60.5kg at $2.90. Previously second-up favourite; ran on from midfield and won by 2 len at this track Superf&M Mdn-Sw September 24 over 1200m defeating Mrs Maree with 55.5kg at $3.40. Will take a lot from that first-up run and with J Mac on looks a serious contender.
